body:
# Purpose 
To run through all current EKP examples, checking they run, checking whether manifests could be updated, and applying our new code-styles and interfaces. 

## Content
Checked and updated examples and docs for:
- [x] Loss Minimization
- [x] Loss Minimization Sparse
- [x] Lorenz (EKI/UKI/distributed) - actually uses priors with transformations, and produces gifs rather than pngs - per - iteration.
- [x] Localization
- [x] Cloudy(EKI/UKI) - also now produces gifs rather than displaying pngs
- [x] AerosolActivation - produces PDFs, and `CloudyMicrophysics` version is pinned to `v0.5`
- [x] ClimateMachine - updated priors
title: Updating and checking EKP examples

body:
## Purpose 
Unifies the constructors with the new prior interfaces. for examples users will not have to calculate means or covariances in computational space of the prior for to build `Unscented` or `Sampler` objects. instead we pass the `prior`.

## Content 
- new (additional) constructors for `Unscented` and `Sampler` objects
- unit tests

## Linked Issues
- Closes #212
title: new tests and constructors

body:
## Purpose
JOSS paper draft

PDF of paper from commit [e8d0820](https://github.com/CliMA/EnsembleKalmanProcesses.jl/pull/210/commits/e8d08204b373e3eeeeb16c10e11d9b3aa60b2ef2) is [here](https://github.com/CliMA/EnsembleKalmanProcesses.jl/files/9677987/paper.pdf)



### To find latest draft
1. Go to github Actions
2. Click on the latest action of `.github/workflows/draft-pdf.yml` on push to `orad/JOSS-draft` (will be the name of the latest commit)
3. Click on `paper` in the `Artifacts section`, this is a zip file containing the latest PDF

TODO:
- Adding EDMF description of use?
- Cloudy description / RF?
- readthroughs
title: JOSS draft paper
